homePage.workSecurityDescription: We use cutting edge technologies to secure your transactions.
homePage.workPlatformDescription: The platform is built for your convenience, based on time saving and easy to use methods.
homePage.workSupportDescription: A highly experienced customer support staff is at your disposal for any issue you may have.
homePage.converterTitle: Exchange BTC, ETH, AUD, USD & EUR
homePage.converterDescription: Make an exchange with an incredible speed
homePage.plansDescription: Exchange swiftly and securely. At Bitvera, all of your funds are transferred using the safest possible methods.
homePage.faqPersonalDataEncryptionBody: Your personal information is completely encrypted with cutting-edge technologies.
homePage.faqComplianceBody: We verify our client’s identity at the highest level of compliance through AML and KYC checks.
homePage.faqTransactionSecurityBody: We are always one step ahead! Our multi-layer security protocol ensures the highest standards of client safety.
homePage.faqKycTitle: Why do I need to pass the KYC check?
homePage.faqKycBody: KYC verification helps us manage risks by verifying that every customer using our platform is not a risk to us or, more importantly, to you.
homePage.faqKycBodySecondary: KYC is developed to avoid the risk of identity theft, money laundering, financial fraud, and criminal organisation financing.
homePage.faqSupportBody: We are here six days a week, from Monday till Saturday 10:00 – 02:00 GMT+3. On all other hours, you can email the support, and we will be in contact with you in less than 24 hours.
homePage.faqDescription: Our KYC process is simple and secure:
homePage.servicesBody: Your privacy and security is our main objective. We have developed an impeccable safeguard system that excellently counters any threat to your data, funds, and transactions.
homePage.startStepOne: Sign up and verify your email
homePage.approachBodyPrimary: Every transaction is carefully screened and reviewed, not only for the platform's security but also for yours.
homePage.approachBodySecondary: Bitvera offers a cryptocurrency exchange that is guaranteed safe, efficient and convenient. Anyone, whether new or experienced, may buy and sell crypto at competitive rates and in a 'worry-free' environment, thanks to the technologies we deploy.
homePage.solutionsDescription: Your privacy and security are our main objectives.

aboutPage.heroSubtitle: Our Bitvera family was founded with a great purpose: to provide our customers with a new level of cryptocurrency exchanging experience.
aboutPage.cardTitle: Cryptocurrency has never been that simple
aboutPage.cardDescription: Sign up and exchange BTC & ETH!
aboutPage.missionDescription:
to implement significant efficiency, security, and convenience features in our crypto exchanging platform.
The technology we utilise allows for quick and easy crypto buying and selling in a completely worry-free environment.
aboutPage.professionalsItemOne: Bitvera is owned and maintained by a company with an extra qualified team and years of experience in the industry.
aboutPage.professionalsItemTwo: We offer the perfect exchange solution for you, whether you are new to the world of cryptocurrencies or an experienced user.

affiliateProgramPage.ctaBodyLineOne: We look forward to partnering with you!
affiliateProgramPage.ctaBodyLineTwo: Please feel free to contact the Bitvera Affiliate Team with any questions. Generally, we respond to email requests within 24 hours.
affiliateProgramPage.ctaBodyLineThree: Don't hesitate to contact our live chat customer support if you need urgent assistance.
affiliateProgramPage.formTitle: Create your affiliate profile and get an individual referral link
affiliateProgramPage.heroTitle: Earn with our affiliate program when you bring new clients to Bitvera
affiliateProgramPage.heroSubtitle: We aim to provide customers with maximum advantages, focusing on offering effective and competitive partnership programs.
affiliateProgramPage.stepsTitle: 4 easy steps to start earning with Bitvera
affiliateProgramPage.introCardPrimaryText: You will get a volume-based rebate for every completed exchange transaction of customers you bring to us.
affiliateProgramPage.introCardSecondaryText: Your privacy and security are our main objectives.
affiliateProgramPage.introCardTertiaryText: Bitvera affiliate program is designed for customers with a strong online presence, from website owners, social media influencers, and affiliate marketers to SEO professionals.
affiliateProgramPage.stepOneBody: Please complete the application form provided below. Our Bitvera team will carefully assess your request. Upon pre-approval of your application, you will receive an affiliate service agreement and a list of KYB documents necessary to verify your business. Additionally, we will provide you with an individual referral link, an affiliate dashboard, and various marketing materials and guidelines to assist you in getting started.
affiliateProgramPage.stepTwoBody: Kindly submit a signed service agreement and the necessary documents to verify your business. Additionally, we request that you provide us with a comprehensive list of channels and resources for promoting our brand (such as websites, blogs, social influencers, networking platforms, etc.). Please include an example of promotional material featuring your referral link. Your submitted documents, channels, and materials will be carefully reviewed within 48 hours. We reserve the right to approve, disapprove, or suggest any necessary changes.
affiliateProgramPage.stepThreeBody: Start introducing new customers to Bitvera with a dedicated link. Our dedicated team can collaborate and create customised offerings for your audience. Our Compliance and Support team oversees the KYC verification process for each customer order. You just link to Bitvera in articles, create new content, or place ads on your website.
affiliateProgramPage.stepFourBody: By promoting Bitvera and using your referral link, you will earn a commission from each exchange transaction completed by verified customers who have registered through your efforts. The remuneration offered is highly appealing, and there is no limit to how much you can earn - the more customers you refer, the greater your potential earnings. You can conveniently monitor transaction volumes through your affiliate dashboard. Commissions are paid out every Monday unless you have any inquiries or corrections to be addressed, which you can communicate to our dedicated affiliate manager. Please note that only affiliates who have completed KYB verification can receive affiliate commissions.

contactUsPage.heroSubtitle: Contact us if you have any technical questions! We are always here for you.
contactUsPage.stepOneBody: If you don't have a Bitvera profile yet, now is the time to register. It's free and doesn't take much time. You just need to fill out the form and confirm your registration.
contactUsPage.stepTwoBody: Verification differs depending on the amount of the transaction. You can find our terms and verification requirements below.
contactUsPage.stepThreeBody: We don't store any cryptocurrencies or fiat currency. To buy cryptocurrency, you need to have a wallet to store it.
contactUsPage.stepThreeBodySecondary: We recommend (but do not insist) to open wallets on the official website of Bitcoin or Ethereum to open up your designated virtual wallet, or you can get a multi-function e-wallet that can store different cryptocurrencies. If you already have an e-wallet, link it to your Bitvera profile.
contactUsPage.stepFourTitle: Choose the crypto and how much you want to buy/sell
contactUsPage.stepFourBody: We focus on Bitcoin and Ethereum to deliver a simple and reliable exchange experience.
contactUsPage.stepFiveTitle: Wait for the transaction to be approved!
contactUsPage.stepFiveBody: Don't worry. It might take a while.

wireTransfer.question: Can I pay with a wire transfer?
wireTransfer.answer: Yes, you can purchase digital currency through a bank wire transfer.

supported.question: What cryptocurrencies are supported on Bitvera?
supported.answer: Currently, we support Bitcoin and Ethereum only.

wallet.question: From where can I obtain a Bitcoin or Ethereum wallet?
wallet.answer: Bitvera does not provide wallets. We are here to send coins to the wallet you choose.

transaction.question: How can I ensure the coins were sent to my chosen wallet?
transaction.answer: You can verify the transaction records by checking http://blockchain.info/address/YOURADDRESS. It will display the coins sent to or from your wallet address.

sell.question: Is it possible to sell cryptocurrency through Bitvera?
sell.answer: Yes, it is. You can sell Bitcoin and Ethereum through Bitvera and receive FIAT currency directly into your bank profile.

factors.question: What factors determine the exchange rate?
factors.answer: Bitvera aims to execute transactions at or close to the prevailing market exchange rate, determined by liquidity providers such as kraken.com Cryptocurrency Exchange.

when.question: At what point is the exchange rate determined?
when.answer: The exchange rate is determined once we receive the payment and process the order.

delivery.question: Do I receive the cryptocurrency immediately after making the payment?
delivery.answer: No, you don't. The crypto is sent to your wallet only after completing a full KYC verification and upon approval and confirmation of your payment and wallet address.

id.question: Is it possible to buy crypto without uploading my ID?
id.answer: No, it isn't. You must upload your verification documents to purchase crypto.

kycDocument.question: What is the purpose of signing the KYC document?
kycDocument.answer: KYC (Know Your Customer) is a legal requirement for buying a certain amount of cryptocurrency. We strictly adhere to regulatory rules and request KYC for every purchase.

personalInformation.question: Why is it necessary to provide my personal information and documents?
personalInformation.answer: To comply with Regulatory Guidance and ensure the highest security and privacy standards, we require the completion of a successful “Know Your Client” procedure. This helps protect your profile, prevent fraud, and maintain a secure financial service.

cardDetails.question: Are my credit card details stored in the Bitvera system?
cardDetails.answer: Your credit/debit card details are not saved in our system.

timeframe.question: What is the expected timeframe for the cryptocurrency to be delivered to my wallet?
timeframe.answer: We make commercially reasonable efforts to settle exchange orders as soon as possible, typically within five days after submitting a transaction order and completing full KYC verification.

cancel.question: Is there an option to cancel my order?
cancel.answer: Orders can only be cancelled before Bitvera executes the exchange transaction. Please get in touch with our support at [EMAIL] for assistance.

supportHours.question: What are the working hours of your support team?
supportHours.answer: Our dedicated customer support is ready to assist you Monday to Friday from 10:00 to 2:00 and Saturday and Sunday from 10:00 to 18:00 (UTC/GMT +2:00).

notFoundPage.messagePrimary: La pagina che stai cercando sembra aver preso un’altra direzione.
notFoundPage.messageSecondary: Potrebbe essere stata spostata, o forse non è mai esistita. In ogni caso, il tuo percorso continua.

notFound.title: 404 - Pagina non trovata
notFound.description: La pagina che hai provato a raggiungere non è qui.

engagementPlansPage.corePlanDescription: Un pacchetto pratico pensato per chi ha bisogno di una presenza online semplice e professionale, senza funzionalità avanzate su misura.
engagementPlansPage.frameworkPlanDescription: Un pacchetto flessibile per chi ha bisogno di più struttura, personalizzazione e spazio per crescere.
engagementPlansPage.expansionPlanDescription: Pensato per progetti in crescita che richiedono più funzionalità e flessibilità.
engagementPlansPage.expansionPlanIncludedPageCount: Fino a 10 pagine o sezioni personalizzate
engagementPlansPage.expansionPlanIncludedWebApp: Funzionalità base da web app (se necessarie)
engagementPlansPage.architecturePlanDescription: Una soluzione completa per progetti complessi che richiedono funzionalità personalizzate, flessibilità e scalabilità nel lungo periodo.
engagementPlansPage.fullStackPlanDescription: Una soluzione digitale completa e di alto livello, costruita da zero. Ideale per idee complesse che richiedono precisione, scalabilità e un approccio interamente su misura.
engagementPlansPage.fullStackPlanIncludedSolution: Soluzione web o applicazione completamente personalizzata
engagementPlansPage.fullStackPlanIncludedDesign: UI/UX avanzata e logica di interazione
engagementPlansPage.fullStackPlanIncludedEcosystem: Ecosistema completo di integrazioni (API, strumenti, servizi)

whatWeBuildPage.customWebsitesDescription: Creiamo siti completamente personalizzati intorno alla tua visione e ai tuoi obiettivi. Che si tratti di un progetto personale, di un portfolio o di un sito per servizi, ogni dettaglio viene curato per riflettere la tua identità mantenendo usabilità e performance.
whatWeBuildPage.customWebsitesIncludedResponsiveDesign: Design responsive su tutti i dispositivi
whatWeBuildPage.customWebsitesIncludedScalableArchitectu: Architettura scalabile per la crescita futura
whatWeBuildPage.webApplicationsDescription: Per esigenze più avanzate realizziamo web application che vanno oltre le pagine statiche. Queste soluzioni includono funzionalità personalizzate, interazioni utente e logiche di sistema modellate sulle tue necessità specifiche.
whatWeBuildPage.webApplicationsIncludedSecureLogic: Gestione sicura dei dati e logiche di sistema
whatWeBuildPage.webApplicationsIncludedIntegrations: Integrazione con strumenti di terze parti
whatWeBuildPage.uiUxDesignDescription: Il design non riguarda solo l’aspetto, ma anche il modo in cui il tuo prodotto funziona. Creiamo interfacce naturali, strutturate e facili da navigare, per garantire un’esperienza fluida a ogni utente.
whatWeBuildPage.ecommerceSolutionsDescription: Realizziamo store online facili da gestire e semplici da usare. L’obiettivo è creare un’esperienza senza attriti, dalla navigazione dei prodotti al checkout, mantenendo stabilità e performance.
whatWeBuildPage.landingPagesDescription: Le landing page sono progettate con un solo obiettivo: comunicare con chiarezza e guidare l’azione. Creiamo pagine che accompagnano l’utente in modo naturale, senza distrazioni o elementi superflui.
whatWeBuildPage.landingPagesIncludedResponsive: Design responsive e a caricamento veloce
whatWeBuildPage.websiteRedesignDescription: Se il tuo sito attuale non riflette più la tua visione o non performa in modo efficace, ti aiutiamo a trasformarlo in un prodotto moderno, strutturato ed efficiente.
whatWeBuildPage.performanceOptimizationDescription: Velocità e performance influenzano direttamente l’esperienza utente. Analizziamo e miglioriamo il tuo sito o la tua applicazione per assicurarne efficienza e affidabilità.
whatWeBuildPage.maintenanceSupportDescription: I prodotti digitali richiedono cura continua. Offriamo supporto costante per mantenere il tuo progetto sicuro, aggiornato e funzionante senza interruzioni.
whatWeBuildPage.maintenanceSupportIncludedBugFixes: Bug fixing e risoluzione dei problemi

selectedWorkPage.personalPortfolioPlatformOverview: Un portfolio pulito e minimale, progettato per una persona che presenta lavori creativi e servizi.
selectedWorkPage.personalPortfolioPlatformChallenge: Il cliente aveva bisogno di un modo strutturato per mostrare il proprio lavoro senza sovraccaricare i visitatori, mantenendo al contempo un design curato e professionale.
selectedWorkPage.personalPortfolioPlatformSolution: Abbiamo sviluppato un sito su misura con layout chiaro, navigazione fluida e design responsive, lasciando ai contenuti il ruolo principale.
selectedWorkPage.ecommerceStoreForNicheProductsOverview: Uno store online per una piccola attività di nicchia, con focus su semplicità e usabilità.
selectedWorkPage.ecommerceStoreForNicheProductsChallenge: Creare un’esperienza d’acquisto fluida senza complessità inutili o un’interfaccia pesante.
selectedWorkPage.ecommerceStoreForNicheProductsSolution: Abbiamo combinato una struttura prodotto essenziale con un flusso di checkout intuitivo, rendendo il percorso d’acquisto chiaro ed efficiente.
selectedWorkPage.serviceBasedWebsiteOverview: Un sito multi-pagina progettato per una persona che offre servizi professionali.
selectedWorkPage.serviceBasedWebsiteChallenge: Il cliente aveva bisogno di comunicare in modo chiaro i servizi e guidare gli utenti verso una richiesta o una prenotazione.
selectedWorkPage.serviceBasedWebsiteSolution: Abbiamo strutturato il sito con sezioni mirate, una forte gerarchia visiva e call to action chiare.
selectedWorkPage.webApplicationForBookingSystemTitle: Web application per sistema di prenotazione
selectedWorkPage.webApplicationForBookingSystemOverview: Una web application su misura che consente agli utenti di gestire prenotazioni e sessioni.
selectedWorkPage.webApplicationForBookingSystemChallenge: Sviluppare un sistema facile da usare pur gestendo molteplici interazioni e input utente.
selectedWorkPage.webApplicationForBookingSystemSolution: Abbiamo creato un backend strutturato con un’interfaccia frontend semplice, rendendo la gestione delle sessioni veloce e flessibile.
selectedWorkPage.websiteRedesignProjectTitle: Progetto di redesign del sito web
selectedWorkPage.websiteRedesignProjectOverview: Un redesign completo di un sito obsoleto che mancava di struttura e performance.
selectedWorkPage.websiteRedesignProjectChallenge: Migliorare l’usabilità e modernizzare l’esperienza visiva senza perdere i contenuti esistenti.
selectedWorkPage.websiteRedesignProjectSolution: Abbiamo ricostruito il sito con una nuova struttura, una navigazione migliorata e performance ottimizzate.
selectedWorkPage.highPerformanceLandingPageOverview: Una soluzione a pagina singola pensata per presentare chiaramente un’idea e guidare l’azione dell’utente.
selectedWorkPage.highPerformanceLandingPageChallenge: Mantenere la pagina semplice ma allo stesso tempo coinvolgente ed efficace.
selectedWorkPage.highPerformanceLandingPageSolution: Ci siamo concentrati su chiarezza, contenuti strutturati e interazioni fluide per guidare gli utenti in modo naturale.

cookiePopup.title: Informativa sui cookie
cookiePopup.text: Usiamo i cookie per far funzionare tutto come previsto e per capire meglio come i visitatori interagiscono con il sito.

footer.legalSecondary: This website and its content have been produced and disseminated for persons outside of the United Kingdom. The information provided is not directed at or intended for distribution to, or use by, any person or entity located within the UK. The financial products and services mentioned on this website are not eligible for the UK. blogPage.legalNotice: Questo articolo e i suoi contenuti sono stati prodotti e diffusi per persone al di fuori del Regno Unito. Le informazioni fornite non sono dirette né destinate alla distribuzione o all'utilizzo da parte di persone o entità situate nel Regno Unito. I prodotti e i servizi finanziari menzionati in questo articolo non sono disponibili nel Regno Unito.
